title: ESFA Update: 3 April 2024
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Information time off timetable for early career teachers and mentors who participated in the national roll-out of the early career framework – updated conditions of grant   Information backfill payments for time off timetable for ECF mentor training – updated conditions of grant for 2023 to 2024   Information adult skills fund – funding rates and formula guidance 2024 to 2025 (version 1)   Information Teacher Mentoring Programme     Latest for academies     Article Title     Information time off timetable for early career teachers and mentors who participated in the national roll-out of the early career framework – updated conditions of grant   Information backfill payments for time off timetable for ECF mentor training – updated conditions of grant for 2023 to 2024   Information national non-domestic rates claim form for academies and academy trusts and accompanying guidance has been published   Information final pupil premium allocations for 2023 to 2024 have been published   Information all general annual grant allocations for 2024 to 2025 have been issued   Information the Buying for Schools summer term webinar schedule is open for bookings   Information Academy Finance Professionals April Power Hour   Information Teacher Mentoring Programme     Latest for local authorities     Article Title     Information time off timetable for early career teachers and mentors who participated in the national roll-out of the early career framework – updated conditions of grant   Information backfill payments for time off timetable for ECF mentor training – updated conditions of grant for 2023 to 2024   Information schemes for financing schools update for 2024 to 2025 has been published   Information final pupil premium allocations for 2023 to 2024 have been published   Information consistent financial reporting data collection for 2023 to 2024 is now open   Information adult skills fund – funding rates and formula guidance 2024 to 2025 (version 1)   Information the Buying for Schools summer term webinar schedule is open for bookings   Information Teacher Mentoring Programme   Information the national non-domestic rates claim form for 2024 to 2025 for local authorities who are also billing authorities is open    "
